dict.string: launchd StartCalendarInterval has no timezone key (Hour/Minute are always evaluated in the system's local time zone). This machine's system clock is America/Los_Angeles, so times below are PDT, chosen to bracket every cron job that needs the machine awake regardless of AC/battery power: 22:50 PDT - bridge start (paired with the pmset repeat wake below) 23:00 PDT - mlb_tb_line nightly (etl/reconcile/report) 06:20 PDT - ca-jepa pre-market order submission (weekdays) 07:00 PDT - mlb_tb_line morning snapshot + first scan-live 9h assertion covers 22:50 PDT through 07:50 PDT with margin for a slow-running job.
